# spirl_trust_domain_deployment_config (Resource)

Manages trust domain deployment-level configuration sections in SPIRL. Each section is a self-describing YAML document keyed by section name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "spirl_trust_domain_deployment_config" "main" {
  trust_domain_deployment_id = spirl_trust_domain_deployment.example.id

  sections = {
    KeyManager = <<-YAML
      section: KeyManager
      schema: v1
      spec:
        extensions:
          awsKMS:
            region: "us-east-1"
    YAML
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `sections` (Map of String) A map of configuration section names to their self-describing YAML values
- `trust_domain_deployment_id` (String) The ID of the trust domain deployment

### Read-Only

- `updated_at` (String) An RFC3339 timestamp for when the configuration was last updated
- `version` (String) The configuration version, used for optimistic concurrency control
